creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
lock order reversal:

 2nd 0xd86bf2f0 bufwait (bufwait) @ /usr/src/sys/ufs/ffs/ffs_softdep.c:6170
 3rd 0xc700a058 ufs (ufs) @ /usr/src/sys/kern/vfs_subr.c:2083

How-To-Repeat: GENERIC kernel, only devfs and ufs2 filesystems mounted via /dev/ufsid/*
